title: Foolish Fits
description: Foolish Fits is a minimal armor resource pack by HonorableFool
body: This armor resource pack makes armor smaller but still noticable with armor trims being adapted to stay true and close as the vanilla ones are! ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab0874c314e81c6babea88b4429386838912f38b_0.webp) Now Supports Copper Armor!
